name: Interflora India
why: For when the flowers arriving need to make them actually say 'wow'. Premium presentation for someone who appreciates real luxury.

name: The Flora
why: Because they deserve flowers that actually look considered and aesthetic, not just a generic vendor bunch.

name: Jellycat
why: For the person who has sent you a Jellycat meme at least once. The original Gen Z plush obsession.

name: Pop Mart / Labubu
why: For the trendsetter who has been seeing Labubu on every Instagram story and finally wants one of their own.

name: Bored Game Company
why: To fuel their competitive edge during game nights. Sourced from India's most trusted board game retailer.

name: Skillmatics
why: A screen-free, portable card game that makes gifting a game feel thoughtful, not generic.

name: The Plated Project
why: To make their wall feel curated, not cluttered. Every piece from this indie brand is an object, not just a print.

name: Ekibeki
why: For someone who wants their space to carry something beautifully illustrated and deeply personal.

name: The Revolver Club
why: Because their perfect Sunday involves dropping a needle on a record and deep-listening to their favorite album.

name: Music Circle
why: For the old soul. This is the absolute best vintage Indian music on vinyl—no one else comes close.
